info.description:
Customer auth, product catalog, and admin CMS API for the Diagonals website backend.
CSRF Protection:
- State-changing requests (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) without a Bearer token must include the X-CSRF-Token header.
- Obtain a CSRF token via GET /api/v1/auth/csrf or from the csrf_token field in login/register/refresh responses.
- The server sets an HttpOnly cookie named csrf_token automatically.
- Requests with Authorization: Bearer <token> skip CSRF validation.
- Webhook endpoints (/api/v1/payments/midtrans/notification, /api/v1/payments/biteship/notification) are exempt.
info.title: Diagonals API

get.description: Get all detailed shipping addresses for the authenticated customer ordered by primary status first

post.description: Add a detailed shipping address for the authenticated customer, including administrative regions, street details, and optional map pin metadata (latitude/longitude)

put.description: Update an existing shipping address for the authenticated customer, including administrative regions, street details, and optional map pin metadata (latitude/longitude)

get.description: Return the Gorilla CSRF token for the current browser session and ensure the CSRF cookie is present

post.description: Authenticate a customer and create a new active session for the current device or browser. Returns a CSRF token in the csrf_token field.
Revoke the authenticated session for the current device or browser and clear auth cookies
Revoke all active sessions for the authenticated user and clear auth cookies on the current device
Validate the refresh token from HttpOnly cookie against the current session, rotate it, and update auth cookies. Returns a CSRF token in the csrf_token field.
Register a new customer in Go-owned tables and issue access and refresh tokens. Returns a CSRF token in the csrf_token field.
Verify OTP code and set a new password for the account

get.description: List all active sessions for the authenticated user across devices and browsers
Retrieve a list of all care guides

post.description: Create a new care guide

get.description: Retrieve a single care guide by ID

delete.description: Delete a care guide by ID

get.description: Get the authenticated customer's Redis-backed shopping cart

post.description: Add a product to the authenticated customer's Redis-backed shopping cart

patch.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart item in the authenticated customer's cart by cart item id

delete.description: Remove a specific cart item from the authenticated customer's Redis-backed shopping cart by cart item id

get.description: Retrieve a list of all product categories

post.description: Create a new product category

get.description: Retrieve a single category by slug
Retrieve a single category by ID

delete.description: Delete a product category by ID

post.description: Validate the authenticated customer's address, selected cart items, shipping rate, and Midtrans payment request, then create a pending transaction and remove only the selected items from cart
Calculate Biteship courier and service options for the authenticated customer's selected cart items and shipping address

get.description: Retrieve a list of all media files

post.description: Create a new media file record
Confirm a direct upload by moving object from temp to final path and creating a media record
Generate a presigned URL for direct client upload to object storage temp folder
Upload a media file via multipart/form-data, convert non-WebP images to WebP, upload to MinIO, and create a media record

get.description: Retrieve a single media file by ID

put.description: Update an existing media file record

delete.description: Delete a media file record by ID

post.description: Receive Biteship shipping webhook events and sync shipping status/tracking by Biteship order id. Empty body probe requests are acknowledged with 200 for webhook installation checks.

parameters.description: Webhook secret (preferred header for real events)
parameters.name: X-Biteship-Webhook-Secret

parameters.description: Webhook token passed in callback URL when custom headers are unavailable
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: Biteship webhook payload; may be empty for installation probe
parameters.name: payload

200.description: notification processed | notification ignored | notification probe acknowledged

post.description: Verify Midtrans signature and update transaction payment status by order id

get.description: Retrieve a list of all products, optionally filtered by category slug

post.description: Create a new product with variants, colors, sizes, and gallery

get.description: Retrieve a single product by slug with all relations
Retrieve a single product by ID with all relations

put.description: Update an existing product with variants, colors, sizes, and gallery

get.description: Retrieve products in the same category excluding the given product
Retrieve a list of all product seasons

get.description: Retrieve a single season by slug
Retrieve a single season by ID

get.description: Get paginated transaction history for the authenticated customer, optionally filtered by payment status
Get one transaction detail by order id for the authenticated customer
Get current shipping tracking data for a paid transaction. By default data is served from local transaction state; use refresh=true to fetch latest status and events from Biteship API.
Retrieve a list of all admin users

post.description: Create a new admin user
Invite a user to become an admin. If the user already exists, they are promoted immediately. Otherwise, an invite email is sent.

get.description: Check if an invite token is valid and whether the user already exists.

post.description: Redeem an invite token to promote the associated user to admin.

get.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user
Retrieve a single user by their ID

delete.description: Delete an admin user by ID
